title: SACRAMENTO

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "There has been an increase in high profile cyberattacks on both private sector firms and federal, state, and local governments.",
    "Cyberattacks occur without warning and often remain undetected for long periods.",
    "Cyberattacks frequently target victims without a clear motive.",
    "The frequency of cyberattacks is not a matter of 'if,' but 'when.'",
    "California is actively working to make its residents less vulnerable to cyberattacks.",
    "The Select Committee on Cybersecurity has oversight of several state government agencies and programs.",
    "The efforts of the Select Committee have resulted in legislation mandating cybersecurity assessments of state departments.",
    "Legislation has been enacted to protect voter registration records from cyber threats.",
    "Minimum security standards for 'smart' devices have been required by legislation."
  ]
}
```
